Modul 36: Django — Kirish va Tuzilma

Django o'rnatish:
pip install django psycopg2-binary python-dotenv
django-admin startproject myproject .
python manage.py startapp myapp

Asosiy buyruqlar:
python manage.py runserver
python manage.py makemigrations / migrate
python manage.py createsuperuser
python manage.py shell
python manage.py collectstatic

MVT arxitektura:
Model (models.py) → View (views.py) → Template (HTML)

Loyiha tuzilmasi:
project/ — konfiguratsiya (settings, urls, wsgi)
app/ — funksional modul (models, views, urls, admin)

nazariya:
Django ORM (Object-Relational Mapping) — Python classlar orqali ma'lumotlar bazasi bilan ishlash imkonini beradi. SQL yozmasdan suduriq MB operatsiyalarini bajarish mumkin.

**Asosiy model yaratish:**

```python
# users/models.py
from django.db import models
from django.contrib.auth.models import AbstractUser

class User(AbstractUser):
    """Django standart User'ini kengaytirish"""
    
    DIRECTION_CHOICES = [
        ('python', 'Python'),
        ('web', 'Web Development'),
        ('telegram', 'Telegram Bot'),
        ('trading', 'TradingView'),
        ('data', 'Data Analysis'),
    ]
    
    email = models.EmailField(unique=True)
    xp = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    streak = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    direction = models.CharField(
        max_length=20,
        choices=DIRECTION_CHOICES,
        default='python'
    )
    avatar = models.ImageField(
        upload_to='avatars/',
        null=True,
        blank=True
    )
    bio = models.TextField(blank=True)
    is_premium = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)
    
    USERNAME_FIELD = 'email'
    REQUIRED_FIELDS = ['username']
    
    class Meta:
        db_table = 'users'
        ordering = ['-xp']
        verbose_name = 'Foydalanuvchi'
        verbose_name_plural = 'Foydalanuvchilar'
    
    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.username} ({self.xp} XP)"
    
    def add_xp(self, amount):
        """XP qo'shish va level hisoblash"""
        self.xp += amount
        self.save(update_fields=['xp'])
    
    @property
    def level(self):
        """XP asosida level hisoblash"""
        return (self.xp // 1000) + 1
```

**Bir-ko'p va ko'p-ko'p munosabatlar:**

```python
# courses/models.py
from django.db import models
from django.conf import settings

class Course(models.Model):
    title = models.CharField(max_length=200)
    description = models.TextField()
    direction = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    is_premium = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    order = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    
    class Meta:
        ordering = ['order']
    
    def __str__(self):
        return self.title


class Lesson(models.Model):
    # ForeignKey — ko'p Lesson, bitta Course
    course = models.ForeignKey(
        Course,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name='lessons'  # course.lessons.all()
    )
    title = models.CharField(max_length=200)
    theory = models.TextField()
    xp_reward = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=50)
    order = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    
    class Meta:
        ordering = ['order']
        unique_together = [['course', 'order']]
    
    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.course.title} — {self.title}"


class UserProgress(models.Model):
    # ForeignKey bilan foydalanuvchi progress'ini saqlash
    user = models.ForeignKey(
        settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name='progress'
    )
    lesson = models.ForeignKey(
        Lesson,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name='user_progress'
    )
    is_completed = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    score = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    completed_at = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)
    
    class Meta:
        unique_together = [['user', 'lesson']]
    
    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.user.username} — {self.lesson.title}"
```

**Migration jarayoni:**

```bash
# Model o'zgarganda:
python manage.py makemigrations
# Migrations for 'users':
#   users/migrations/0001_initial.py

python manage.py migrate
# Applying users.0001_initial... OK

# Muayyan app uchun
python manage.py makemigrations users
python manage.py migrate users

# SQL ni ko'rish (bajarmasdan)
python manage.py sqlmigrate users 0001
```

**Django ORM so'rovlari:**

```python
# Barcha foydalanuvchilar
users = User.objects.all()

# Filter — shartli qidirish
active_users = User.objects.filter(is_active=True)
premium_users = User.objects.filter(is_premium=True, xp__gte=1000)

# Bitta obyekt
user = User.objects.get(id=1)          # topilmasa: DoesNotExist
user = User.objects.filter(id=1).first()  # topilmasa: None

# Exclude — teskari filter
non_premium = User.objects.exclude(is_premium=True)

# Tartib
top_users = User.objects.order_by('-xp')[:10]  # Top 10

# Yangilash (SQL UPDATE)
User.objects.filter(xp__lt=100).update(streak=0)

# O'chirish (SQL DELETE)
User.objects.filter(is_active=False).delete()

# Aggregatsiya
from django.db.models import Count, Sum, Avg
stats = User.objects.aggregate(
    total=Count('id'),
    total_xp=Sum('xp'),
    avg_xp=Avg('xp')
)

# Related ma'lumotlar (JOIN)
lessons = Lesson.objects.select_related('course').filter(
    course__direction='python'
)

# Ko'p-ko'p optimizatsiya
users_with_progress = User.objects.prefetch_related('progress__lesson')
```

**Custom Manager va QuerySet:**

```python
class UserQuerySet(models.QuerySet):
    def active(self):
        return self.filter(is_active=True)
    
    def premium(self):
        return self.filter(is_premium=True)
    
    def top_learners(self, n=10):
        return self.order_by('-xp')[:n]

class UserManager(models.Manager):
    def get_queryset(self):
        return UserQuerySet(self.model, using=self._db)
    
    def active(self):
        return self.get_queryset().active()

# Model'ga qo'shish:
class User(AbstractUser):
    objects = UserManager()
    # ...

# Ishlatish
top = User.objects.active().top_learners(5)
```

quiz.B: Asosiy model o'chirilganda, bog'liq barcha yozuvlar ham o'chiriladi
quiz.tushuntirish: `CASCADE` — agar `Course` o'chirilsa, unga bog'liq barcha `Lesson`'lar ham avtomatik o'chiriladi. Boshqa variantlar: `SET_NULL` (NULL qiladi), `PROTECT` (o'chirishni taqiqlaydi), `SET_DEFAULT` (default qiymat o'rnatadi).

quiz.B: `auto_now_add` faqat yaratilganda, `auto_now` har saqlanganda vaqtni yozadi
quiz.tushuntirish: `auto_now_add=True` — yaratilganda bir marta vaqt yozadi va o'zgarmaydi (`created_at` uchun). `auto_now=True` — har `save()` chaqirilganda yangilanadi (`updated_at` uchun). Ikkalasi ham `editable=False` bo'ladi.

quiz.B: ForeignKey/OneToOne bog'liq modellarni bitta SQL JOIN so'rovida olish uchun (N+1 muammosini hal qiladi)
quiz.tushuntirish: N+1 muammo: 100 ta lesson va ularning course'larini olsangiz, 1 (lessons) + 100 (har lesson uchun course) = 101 so'rov ketadi. `select_related('course')` esa bitta JOIN so'rovda hammasini oladi. Ko'p narsa ko'rsatadigan sahifalarda bu farq katta.

quiz.A: user va lesson maydonlari bo'sh bo'lmasin
quiz.B: Bitta foydalanuvchi bitta darsga faqat bir marta yozilishi mumkin (juft qiymatlar noyob)
quiz.C: Ikkala maydon bir xil turda bo'lishi kerak
quiz.tushuntirish: `unique_together` ma'lumotlar bazasida composite unique constraint yaratadi. `(user_id=1, lesson_id=5)` bir marta bo'lishi mumkin, lekin `(user_id=1, lesson_id=6)` yoki `(user_id=2, lesson_id=5)` mumkin. Bu dublikat progress yozuvlaridan saqlaydi.

quiz.A: Greater than or equal — 1000 ga teng yoki katta
quiz.tushuntirish: Django ORM lookup'lari: `__gte` (≥), `__gt` (>), `__lte` (≤), `__lt` (<), `__exact` (=), `__icontains` (katta-kichik harfsiz qidirish), `__startswith`, `__in` (ro'yxatda), `__isnull`. Bular SQL WHERE shartlarini Python'da ifodalaydi.

pdf_reference:
Modul 37: Django Models va Migrations

Maydon turlari:
CharField, TextField, IntegerField, BooleanField
EmailField, URLField, ImageField, FileField
DateTimeField(auto_now_add, auto_now)
ForeignKey, ManyToManyField, OneToOneField

Meta options:
db_table, ordering, unique_together, verbose_name

ORM so'rovlari:
all() | filter() | exclude() | get() | first()
order_by() | values() | annotate() | aggregate()
select_related() | prefetch_related()
update() | delete() | create() | get_or_create()

Migrations:
makemigrations → migrate → sqlmigrate

quiz.B: Foydalanuvchini topadi, topilmasa 404 HTTP xatosini qaytaradi
quiz.tushuntirish: `get_object_or_404` `User.objects.get(id=user_id)` dan farqli: `DoesNotExist` exception o'rniga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri HTTP 404 javob qaytaradi. Views'da bu juda qulay — try/except yozish shart emas, foydalanuvchi esa to'g'ri xato sahifasini ko'radi.

quiz.savol: Django template'da `{% url 'users:detail' user.pk %}` nima qiladi?
quiz.B: `users` namespace'idagi `detail` URL nomiga `user.pk` argument bilan URL qaytaradi
quiz.tushuntirish: `{% url %}` tag URL'ni hardcode qilmaslik uchun ishlatiladi. `users:detail` — `users` app namespac'idagi `detail` URL nomi, `user.pk` — parametr. Agar URL o'zgartirse, template'ni o'zgartirish shart emas — URL nomi qoladi.

quiz.B: Sahifada 20 tadan ko'p bo'lsa, paginatsiya yoqiladi va har sahifada 20 ta yozuv ko'rsatiladi
quiz.tushuntirish: `paginate_by` ListViewda avtomatik paginatsiyani yoqadi. `?page=2` URL parametri bilan keyingi sahifaga o'tish mumkin. Template'da `page_obj`, `paginator`, `is_paginated` context o'zgaruvchilari avtomatik qo'shiladi.

quiz.B: Autentifikatsiya qilinmagan foydalanuvchini login sahifasiga yo'naltiradi
quiz.tushuntirish: `@login_required` kirish talab qilinadigan sahifalarni himoya qiladi. Agar foydalanuvchi login qilmagan bo'lsa, `settings.LOGIN_URL` (default: `/accounts/login/`) ga redirect qilinadi va `?next=/original-url/` parametri qo'shiladi.

Choices bilan field'larda Django avtomatik `get_FIELDNAME_display()` metod yaratadi. Agar `direction = 'python'` va choices'da `('python', 'Python Development')` bo'lsa, `.get_direction_display()` `'Python Development'` qaytaradi — insoniy o'qiladi.

nazariya:
Django REST Framework (DRF) — Django ustida qurilgan kuchli REST API yaratish kutubxonasi. Serializer, ViewSet, Router — asosiy qurilish bloklari.

**O'rnatish:**

```bash
pip install djangorestframework
pip install django-cors-headers
```

```python
# settings.py
INSTALLED_APPS = [
    ...
    'rest_framework',
    'corsheaders',
]

REST_FRAMEWORK = {
    'DEFAULT_RENDERER_CLASSES': [
        'rest_framework.renderers.JSONRenderer',
    ],
    'DEFAULT_PAGINATION_CLASS': 'rest_framework.pagination.PageNumberPagination',
    'PAGE_SIZE': 20,
    'DEFAULT_AUTHENTICATION_CLASSES': [
        'rest_framework_simplejwt.authentication.JWTAuthentication',
    ],
    'DEFAULT_PERMISSION_CLASSES': [
        'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated',
    ],
}
```

**Serializers — ma'lumotni JSON'ga aylantirish:**

```python
# users/serializers.py
from rest_framework import serializers
from .models import User

class UserSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    level = serializers.SerializerMethodField()
    
    class Meta:
        model = User
        fields = ['id', 'username', 'email', 'xp', 'streak', 
                  'direction', 'is_premium', 'level', 'created_at']
        read_only_fields = ['id', 'xp', 'streak', 'created_at']
    
    def get_level(self, obj):
        return obj.level


class RegisterSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    password = serializers.CharField(write_only=True, min_length=8)
    password_confirm = serializers.CharField(write_only=True)
    
    class Meta:
        model = User
        fields = ['username', 'email', 'password', 'password_confirm', 'direction']
    
    def validate(self, data):
        if data['password'] != data['password_confirm']:
            raise serializers.ValidationError("Parollar mos kelmadi")
        return data
    
    def validate_email(self, value):
        if User.objects.filter(email=value).exists():
            raise serializers.ValidationError("Bu email allaqachon ro'yxatdan o'tgan")
        return value
    
    def create(self, validated_data):
        validated_data.pop('password_confirm')
        return User.objects.create_user(**validated_data)


# Nested serializer
class LessonSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    class Meta:
        model = Lesson
        fields = ['id', 'title', 'xp_reward', 'order']

class CourseSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    lessons = LessonSerializer(many=True, read_only=True)
    lesson_count = serializers.SerializerMethodField()
    
    class Meta:
        model = Course
        fields = ['id', 'title', 'description', 'direction', 
                  'is_premium', 'lessons', 'lesson_count']
    
    def get_lesson_count(self, obj):
        return obj.lessons.count()
```

**APIView — past darajali view:**

```python
from rest_framework.views import APIView
from rest_framework.response import Response
from rest_framework import status
from rest_framework.permissions import AllowAny, IsAuthenticated

class RegisterView(APIView):
    permission_classes = [AllowAny]
    
    def post(self, request):
        serializer = RegisterSerializer(data=request.data)
        if serializer.is_valid():
            user = serializer.save()
            return Response(
                {'message': 'Muvaffaqiyatli ro\'yxatdan o\'tildi', 'id': user.id},
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED
            )
        return Response(serializer.errors, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)

class UserProfileView(APIView):
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]
    
    def get(self, request):
        serializer = UserSerializer(request.user)
        return Response(serializer.data)
    
    def patch(self, request):
        serializer = UserSerializer(
            request.user, 
            data=request.data, 
            partial=True
        )
        if serializer.is_valid():
            serializer.save()
            return Response(serializer.data)
        return Response(serializer.errors, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)
```

**ViewSet — to'liq CRUD avtomatik:**

```python
from rest_framework import viewsets, filters
from rest_framework.decorators import action
from rest_framework.response import Response

class CourseViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    queryset = Course.objects.all()
    serializer_class = CourseSerializer
    filter_backends = [filters.SearchFilter, filters.OrderingFilter]
    search_fields = ['title', 'description']
    ordering_fields = ['order', 'created_at']
    
    def get_queryset(self):
        qs = super().get_queryset()
        direction = self.request.query_params.get('direction')
        if direction:
            qs = qs.filter(direction=direction)
        return qs
    
    # Custom action
    @action(detail=True, methods=['get'], url_path='lessons')
    def get_lessons(self, request, pk=None):
        course = self.get_object()
        lessons = course.lessons.all()
        serializer = LessonSerializer(lessons, many=True)
        return Response(serializer.data)
    
    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'], url_path='my-progress')
    def my_progress(self, request):
        completed = request.user.progress.filter(is_completed=True).count()
        return Response({'completed_lessons': completed})
```

**Router — URLlarni avtomatik yaratish:**

```python
# courses/urls.py
from rest_framework.routers import DefaultRouter
from . import views

router = DefaultRouter()
router.register('courses', views.CourseViewSet, basename='course')
router.register('lessons', views.LessonViewSet, basename='lesson')

urlpatterns = router.urls

# Natijada quyidagi URL'lar yaratiladi:
# GET    /courses/          — ro'yxat
# POST   /courses/          — yangi yaratish
# GET    /courses/{id}/     — bittasini ko'rish
# PUT    /courses/{id}/     — to'liq yangilash
# PATCH  /courses/{id}/     — qisman yangilash
# DELETE /courses/{id}/     — o'chirish
# GET    /courses/{id}/lessons/  — custom action
```

**Pagination — sahifalash:**

```python
from rest_framework.pagination import PageNumberPagination

class StandardPagination(PageNumberPagination):
    page_size = 20
    page_size_query_param = 'page_size'
    max_page_size = 100
    
    def get_paginated_response(self, data):
        return Response({
            'count': self.page.paginator.count,
            'next': self.get_next_link(),
            'previous': self.get_previous_link(),
            'results': data
        })
```

quiz.savol: DRF Serializer'da `write_only=True` maydon parametri nima qiladi?
quiz.A: Maydon faqat yozish uchun, o'qish uchun emas — API javobida ko'rinmaydi
quiz.B: Maydon faqat o'qish uchun, yozib bo'lmaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: `write_only=True` — parol kabi maxfiy maydonlar uchun: foydalanuvchi yuborishi mumkin, lekin API javobida qaytarilmaydi. `read_only=True` esa teskari: bazadan o'qiladi, lekin foydalanuvchi o'zgartira olmaydi (masalan, `id`, `created_at`).

quiz.B: detail=True bitta ob'ekt uchun (/{id}/action/), detail=False to'plam uchun (/action/)
quiz.tushuntirish: `detail=True` — `/{id}/custom-action/` URL yaratadi, bitta ob'ektga tegishli. `detail=False` — `/custom-action/` URL yaratadi, to'plam darajasida. Masalan: bitta kurs darslari `detail=True`, foydalanuvchi progressi esa `detail=False`.

quiz.B: ViewSet'lar uchun standart CRUD URL'larni avtomatik yaratish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: Router `ModelViewSet` bilan ishlashda 6 ta standart URL'ni avtomatik yaratadi: list, create, retrieve, update, partial_update, destroy. Bu har URL'ni qo'lda yozishdan ozod qiladi va REST konventsiyalariga mos bo'ladi.

quiz.B: `is_valid()` chaqirilganda, `email` maydoniga kiritilgan qiymat validatsiya qilinayotganda
quiz.tushuntirish: `validate_FIELDNAME()` metodi DRF'da field-level validatsiya uchun. `serializer.is_valid()` chaqirilganda har maydon uchun tegishli `validate_` metodi ishga tushadi. Qaytarilgan qiymat yoki `ValidationError` kutiladi.

quiz.B: Model'da mavjud bo'lmagan, hisob-kitob bilan olinadigan maydon qo'shish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: `SerializerMethodField` — model'da to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ustun sifatida mavjud bo'lmagan qiymatlarni qo'shish uchun. Masalan: `level = xp // 1000 + 1` hisoblanadi, lekin bazada saqlanmaydi. `get_FIELDNAME(self, obj)` metodi qaytargan qiymat JSON'ga qo'shiladi.

pdf_reference:
Modul 39: Django REST Framework — Asoslar

O'rnatish:
pip install djangorestframework

Asosiy komponentlar:
• Serializer: Model ↔ JSON (ModelSerializer, Serializer)
• APIView: past darajali, to'liq nazorat
• ViewSet: CRUD avtomatik (ModelViewSet)
• Router: URL'larni avtomatik yaratish
• Pagination: sahifalash

Serializer maxsus maydonlar:
read_only | write_only | required | allow_null
SerializerMethodField — hisoblangan maydon
validate_FIELD() — maydon validatsiyasi
validate() — umumiy validatsiya

ViewSet URL'lari (Router bilan):
GET /resource/ | POST /resource/
GET /resource/{id}/ | PUT/PATCH /resource/{id}/
DELETE /resource/{id}/

mavzu: Django REST Framework — Auth va Permissions

quiz.savol: JWT'da Access token va Refresh token o'rtasidagi asosiy farq nima?
quiz.B: Access token qisqa muddatli (API so'rovlari uchun), Refresh token uzoq muddatli (yangi access token olish uchun)
quiz.C: Refresh token API so'rovlari uchun, Access token faqat birinchi kirish uchun
quiz.D: Access token xavfsizroq, Refresh token eski usul
quiz.tushuntirish: Access token qisqa (odatda 15 daqiqa — 1 soat) — har API so'rovda ishlatiladi. Refresh token uzoq (30 kun) — faqat yangi access token olish uchun. Access token o'g'irlansa, zarar cheklangan (qisqa muddat). Xavfsiz pattern: access tokenni xotirada, refresh tokenni httpOnly cookie'da saqlash.

quiz.B: GET, HEAD, OPTIONS — ma'lumotni o'zgartirmaydigan metodlar
quiz.tushuntirish: `SAFE_METHODS = ('GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS')` — serverda hech qanday o'zgarish qilmaydigan HTTP metodlar. Custom permissionlarda `if request.method in permissions.SAFE_METHODS: return True` patterning ma'nosi: o'qishga hammaga ruxsat, o'zgartirishga faqat ruxsat berilganlarga.

quiz.B: `has_permission` view darajasida (umumiy kirish), `has_object_permission` bitta ob'ekt darajasida (masalan, faqat egasi)
quiz.tushuntirish: `has_permission` har so'rovda tekshiriladi (autentifikatsiya, premium status). `has_object_permission` esa `get_object()` chaqirilganda, ya'ni bitta ob'ektga kirilganda tekshiriladi — ob'ekt egasimi yoki yo'qmi degan savol uchun.

quiz.B: Bitta foydalanuvchi/IP'dan ma'lum vaqt ichida qancha so'rov qilish mumkinligini cheklash
quiz.tushuntirish: Throttling rate limiting deb ham ataladi. DDoS hujumlardan, brute-force login urinishlaridan va API'ni haddan ziyod yuklashdan himoya qiladi. `AnonRateThrottle` autentifikatsiya qilinmaganlar, `UserRateThrottle` esa kirgan foydalanuvchilar uchun. `100/day`, `5/minute` kabi formatda belgilanadi.

quiz.savol: Logout'da `token.blacklist()` nima qiladi va bu nima uchun kerak?
quiz.B: Refresh token'ni yaroqsiz qiladi — boshqa access token ololmaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: JWT stateless — server token'ni saqlamaydi. Logout bo'lsa ham token muddati tugashini kutish kerak. Blacklist esa refresh token'ni bazaga yaroqsiz deb belgilaydi. Shuning uchun `INSTALLED_APPS`'ga `rest_framework_simplejwt.token_blacklist` qo'shish kerak. Foydalanuvchi yangi access token ololmaydi.

pdf_reference:
Modul 40: DRF — Auth va Permissions

JWT o'rnatish:
pip install djangorestframework-simplejwt

Token endpoint'lari:
POST /auth/token/ → {access, refresh}
POST /auth/token/refresh/ → {access}
API so'rovlarda: Authorization: Bearer {access_token}

Permissions:
AllowAny | IsAuthenticated | IsAdminUser
IsAuthenticatedOrReadOnly
Custom: has_permission() | has_object_permission()

Throttling:
AnonRateThrottle: 100/day (login bo'lmaganlar)
UserRateThrottle: 1000/day (login bo'lganlar)

Xavfsiz logout:
RefreshToken.blacklist() — token'ni bekor qilish
token_blacklist app INSTALLED_APPS'ga qo'shiladi

Test:
APIClient + force_authenticate() — tez va ishonchli

nazariya:
Celery — bu Python uchun eng mashhur asinxron task queue kutubxonasi. Django ilovalarida og'ir ishlarni (email yuborish, rasm qayta ishlash, hisobot generatsiya) fon rejimida bajarish uchun ishlatiladi.

**Celery nima uchun kerak?**
Foydalanuvchi so'rov yuborganida server javob qaytarguncha kutishi kerak. Agar email yuborish 3 soniya olsa, foydalanuvchi 3 soniya kutadi. Celery yordamida bu ish fonga yuboriladi va foydalanuvchi darhol javob oladi.

**O'rnatish:**
```bash
pip install celery redis django-celery-beat
```

**settings.py konfiguratsiyasi:**
```python
# settings.py
CELERY_BROKER_URL = 'redis://localhost:6379/0'
CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND = 'redis://localhost:6379/0'
CELERY_ACCEPT_CONTENT = ['json']
CELERY_TASK_SERIALIZER = 'json'
CELERY_RESULT_SERIALIZER = 'json'
CELERY_TIMEZONE = 'Asia/Tashkent'
```

**celery.py fayli (project papkasida):**
```python
# myproject/celery.py
import os
from celery import Celery

os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'myproject.settings')

app = Celery('myproject')
app.config_from_object('django.conf:settings', namespace='CELERY')
app.autodiscover_tasks()

@app.task(bind=True, ignore_result=True)
def debug_task(self):
    print(f'Request: {self.request!r}')
```

**__init__.py da import:**
```python
# myproject/__init__.py
from .celery import app as celery_app
__all__ = ('celery_app',)
```

**Task yaratish (tasks.py):**
```python
# myapp/tasks.py
from celery import shared_task
from django.core.mail import send_mail
import time

@shared_task
def send_welcome_email(user_email, user_name):
    """Yangi foydalanuvchiga xush kelibsiz emaili yuborish"""
    send_mail(
        subject='SYNAPSE ga xush kelibsiz!',
        message=f'Salom {user_name}, platformamizga xush kelibsiz!',
        from_email='noreply@synapse.uz',
        recipient_list=[user_email],
    )
    return f'Email {user_email} ga yuborildi'

@shared_task(bind=True, max_retries=3)
def process_video(self, video_id):
    """Video qayta ishlash — retry bilan"""
    try:
        # og'ir ish simulyatsiyasi
        time.sleep(10)
        return f'Video {video_id} qayta ishlandi'
    except Exception as exc:
        # 60 soniyadan keyin qayta urinish
        raise self.retry(exc=exc, countdown=60)

@shared_task
def generate_report(user_id):
    """Foydalanuvchi hisobotini generatsiya qilish"""
    from myapp.models import UserActivity
    activities = UserActivity.objects.filter(user_id=user_id)
    report_data = {
        'total': activities.count(),
        'completed': activities.filter(status='done').count(),
    }
    return report_data
```

**View da task chaqirish:**
```python
# views.py
from django.http import JsonResponse
from .tasks import send_welcome_email, generate_report

def register_user(request):
    # ... foydalanuvchini saqlash
    user = request.user
    
    # Task fonga yuboriladi — .delay() bilan
    send_welcome_email.delay(user.email, user.username)
    
    return JsonResponse({'status': 'ok', 'message': 'Ro\'yxatdan o\'tdingiz!'})

def get_report(request):
    # Task natijasini olish uchun task_id saqlanadi
    task = generate_report.delay(request.user.id)
    return JsonResponse({'task_id': task.id})

def check_task_status(request, task_id):
    from celery.result import AsyncResult
    result = AsyncResult(task_id)
    return JsonResponse({
        'status': result.status,  # PENDING, SUCCESS, FAILURE
        'result': result.result if result.ready() else None
    })
```

**Periodic Tasks (Celery Beat):**
```python
# settings.py
from celery.schedules import crontab

CELERY_BEAT_SCHEDULE = {
    'har-kuni-hisobot': {
        'task': 'myapp.tasks.generate_daily_report',
        'schedule': crontab(hour=8, minute=0),  # har kuni soat 8:00
    },
    'har-5-daqiqada': {
        'task': 'myapp.tasks.check_pending_orders',
        'schedule': 300.0,  # 300 soniya
    },
}
```

**Worker va Beat ishga tushirish:**
```bash
# Worker
celery -A myproject worker --loglevel=info

# Beat (periodic tasks)
celery -A myproject beat --loglevel=info

# Flower (monitoring UI)
pip install flower
celery -A myproject flower --port=5555
```

Celery yordamida Django ilovangiz tezligi sezilarli oshadi, chunki og'ir operatsiyalar fon worker'larga yuklanadi.

quiz.savol: Celery taskini fonga yuborish uchun qaysi metod ishlatiladi?
quiz.tushuntirish: .delay() metodi taskni broker (Redis/RabbitMQ) orqali worker'ga yuboradi va darhol AsyncResult qaytaradi. .run() esa taskni sinxron (hoziroq) bajaradi.

quiz.C: Task xabarlarini uzatish uchun message broker manzili
quiz.tushuntirish: Broker — Celery va worker o'rtasidagi xabar navbati. Django task yuboradi, broker saqlaydi, worker o'qib bajaradi. Odatda Redis yoki RabbitMQ ishlatiladi.
Celery Beat — scheduler. Har kuni, har soat yoki boshqa jadval asosida task'larni avtomatik ishga tushiradi. Linux'dagi cron'ga o'xshaydi.

quiz.A: Taskni barcha worker'larga parallel yuborish uchun
quiz.B: Celery app'ga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri bog'lanmasdan task yaratish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: @shared_task dekoratori reusable app'lar uchun mo'ljallangan. U Celery instance'ga to'g'ridan bog'lanmaydi, shuning uchun har qanday Django proyektiga qo'shsa bo'ladi.

quiz.savol: Task holatini tekshirish uchun qaysi sinf ishlatiladi?
quiz.tushuntirish: from celery.result import AsyncResult — bu sinf task_id orqali task holatini (PENDING, STARTED, SUCCESS, FAILURE, RETRY) va natijasini tekshirish imkonini beradi.

topshiriq.vazifa: Django + Celery yordamida 'slow_calculation' nomli task yozing. Bu task ikkita sonni qabul qilib, 5 soniya kutgandan keyin ularning ko'paytmasini qaytarsin. View yarating: POST /calculate/ so'rovi kelganda task fonga yuborilsin va task_id qaytarilsin. GET /result/<task_id>/ so'rovida esa natija qaytarilsin.

pdf_reference: Celery Official Docs: https://docs.celeryq.dev/en/stable/ | Django-Celery-Beat: https://django-celery-beat.readthedocs.io/

nazariya:
Cache — bu tez-tez so'raladigan ma'lumotlarni vaqtincha saqlash mexanizmi. Database'ga har safar murojaat qilish o'rniga, natijani cache'da saqlab, keyingi so'rovlarda tez qaytarish mumkin. **Nima uchun Cache kerak?** Har bir DB so'rovi vaqt oladi. Agar 1000 foydalanuvchi bir vaqtda bir xil sahifani ko'rsa, DB 1000 marta bir xil so'rov bajaradi. Cache yordamida bu so'rov bir marta bajariladi, natija Redis'da saqlanadi va qolgan 999 so'rov Redis'dan tezda javob oladi. **O'rnatish:** ```bash pip install django-redis ``` **settings.py konfiguratsiyasi:** ```python CACHES = { 'default': { 'BACKEND': 'django_redis.cache.RedisCache', 'LOCATION': 'redis://127.0.0.1:6379/1', 'OPTIONS': { 'CLIENT_CLASS': 'django_redis.client.DefaultClient', 'SOCKET_CONNECT_TIMEOUT': 5, 'SOCKET_TIMEOUT': 5, }, 'KEY_PREFIX': 'synapse', 'TIMEOUT': 300, # 5 daqiqa (soniyalarda) } } # Session cache SESSION_ENGINE = 'django.contrib.sessions.backends.cache' SESSION_CACHE_ALIAS = 'default' ``` **Low-level Cache API:** ```python from django.core.cache import cache # Saqlash cache.set('my_key', 'my_value', timeout=60) # 60 soniya cache.set('user_data', {'name': 'Ali', 'xp': 150}, timeout=3600) # O'qish value = cache.get('my_key') # yo'q bo'lsa None qaytaradi value = cache.get('my_key', default='fallback_value') # Tekshirish if cache.has_key('my_key'): print('Cache'da bor') # O'chirish cache.delete('my_key') cache.delete_many(['key1', 'key2', 'key3']) cache.clear() # barcha cache'ni tozalash (ehtiyot bo'ling!) # get_or_set — yo'q bo'lsa hisoblab saqla value = cache.get_or_set('expensive_key', lambda: compute_expensive(), timeout=600) ``` **Cache in Views — amaliy misol:** ```python # views.py from django.core.cache import cache from django.http import JsonResponse from .models import Course, Lesson def get_leaderboard(request): cache_key = 'leaderboard_top_10' data = cache.get(cache_key) if data is None: # Cache'da yo'q — DB'dan o'qiymiz users = User.objects.order_by('-xp')[:10].values( 'username', 'xp', 'streak' ) data = list(users) cache.set(cache_key, data, timeout=300) # 5 daqiqaga saqla print('DB'dan o\'qildi') else: print('Cache'dan o\'qildi') return JsonResponse({'leaderboard': data}) def get_course_stats(request, course_id): cache_key = f'course_stats_{course_id}' stats = cache.get(cache_key) if not stats: lessons = Lesson.objects.filter(course_id=course_id) stats = { 'total_lessons': lessons.count(), 'total_students': Enrollment.objects.filter( course_id=course_id ).count(), } cache.set(cache_key, stats, timeout=1800) # 30 daqiqa return JsonResponse(stats) ``` **@cache_page dekoratori:** ```python from django.views.decorators.cache import cache_page from django.views.decorators.vary import vary_on_headers @cache_page(60 * 15) # 15 daqiqa def homepage(request): # Bu view 15 daqiqaga cache'lanadi return render(request, 'home.html') @cache_page(60 * 5) @vary_on_headers('Accept-Language') # har til uchun alohida cache def course_list(request): courses = Course.objects.all() return render(request, 'courses.html', {'courses': courses}) ``` **Cache Invalidation (cache'ni yangilash):** ```python # Signal yordamida model o'zgarganda cache'ni tozalash from django.db.models.signals import post_save, post_delete from django.dispatch import receiver @receiver([post_save, post_delete], sender=User) def invalidate_leaderboard_cache(sender, **kwargs): cache.delete('leaderboard_top_10') cache.delete_pattern('user_stats_*') # pattern bilan o'chirish @receiver(post_save, sender=Lesson) def invalidate_course_cache(sender, instance, **kwargs): cache.delete(f'course_stats_{instance.course_id}') ``` **Fragment Caching (Template'da):** ```html {% load cache %} {% cache 500 sidebar request.user.id %}
{{ user.profile }}
{% endcache %} ``` **Cache monitoring:** ```python # Cache statistikasi (django-redis bilan) from django_redis import get_redis_connection con = get_redis_connection('default') print(con.info()) # Redis server ma'lumoti print(con.dbsize()) # Kalitlar soni ``` Cache to'g'ri ishlatilsa, server yukini 10-100 barobar kamaytirish mumkin.

quiz.tushuntirish: cache.get() kalit topilmasa default holda None qaytaradi. Boshqa default qiymat belgilash mumkin: cache.get('key', default='yo\'q')

quiz.B: View natijasi 900 soniya (15 daqiqa) cache'da saqlanadi
quiz.tushuntirish: 60 * 15 = 900 soniya = 15 daqiqa. @cache_page dekoratori view'ning to'liq HTTP javobini belgilangan vaqtga cache'laydi.
Cache invalidation — ma'lumot o'zgarganda cache'dagi eski versiyani o'chirish. Aks holda foydalanuvchilar eski (noto'g'ri) ma'lumot ko'radi.

quiz.B: Redis'ning boy imkoniyatlari: pattern delete, TTL ko'rish, pub/sub
quiz.tushuntirish: django-redis Redis'ning to'liq imkoniyatlaridan foydalanadi: pattern asosida o'chirish (delete_pattern), Redis CLI orqali monitoring, pub/sub, sorted sets va boshqalar.
Sessiyalarni Redis'da saqlash DB yükini kamaytiradi. Har bir sahifa yuklashida session DB so'rovi o'rniga tez Redis o'qish bo'ladi.

topshiriq.vazifa: products_list view yarating. Bu view barcha mahsulotlarni qaytarsin, lekin natija 5 daqiqaga cache'lansin. Yangi mahsulot qo'shilganda (POST so'rovi) cache avtomatik tozalansin.

nazariya:
FastAPI — Python uchun zamonaviy, yuqori tezlikli web framework. 2018 yilda Sebastián Ramírez tomonidan yaratilgan. Django'dan farqli ravishda FastAPI asinxron (async) asosga qurilgan va avtomatik API dokumentatsiyasi (Swagger UI) yaratib beradi.

**FastAPI vs Django farqlari:**
| Xususiyat | Django | FastAPI |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| Tezlik | O'rta | Juda tez (Node.js darajasida) |
| ORM | O'rnatilgan | Yo'q (SQLAlchemy qo'shiladi) |
| Admin panel | O'rnatilgan | Yo'q |
| API docs | Qo'lda | Avtomatik (Swagger) |
| Async support | Qisman | To'liq |
| Pydantic | Yo'q | O'rnatilgan |

**O'rnatish:**
```bash
pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard]
```

**Birinchi FastAPI ilovasi:**
```python
# main.py
from fastapi import FastAPI
from typing import Optional

app = FastAPI(
    title="SYNAPSE API",
    description="Python ta'lim platformasi API",
    version="1.0.0"
)

@app.get("/")
def root():
    return {"message": "SYNAPSE API ishlayapti!"}

@app.get("/health")
def health_check():
    return {"status": "ok", "version": "1.0.0"}
```

**Ishga tushirish:**
```bash
uvicorn main:app --reload
# http://localhost:8000 — API
# http://localhost:8000/docs — Swagger UI
# http://localhost:8000/redoc — ReDoc
```

**Path Parameters:**
```python
@app.get("/users/{user_id}")
def get_user(user_id: int):  # int deb e'lon qilsak, avtomatik validatsiya
    return {"user_id": user_id}

@app.get("/courses/{course_slug}/lessons/{lesson_id}")
def get_lesson(course_slug: str, lesson_id: int):
    return {
        "course": course_slug,
        "lesson": lesson_id
    }
```

**Query Parameters:**
```python
@app.get("/courses/")
def list_courses(
    skip: int = 0,
    limit: int = 10,
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    active: bool = True
):
    courses = fake_db_courses
    if search:
        courses = [c for c in courses if search.lower() in c['title'].lower()]
    if active:
        courses = [c for c in courses if c['is_active']]
    return courses[skip: skip + limit]

# GET /courses/?skip=0&limit=5&search=python&active=true
```

**Request Body:**
```python
from pydantic import BaseModel

class CourseCreate(BaseModel):
    title: str
    description: str
    price: float
    is_active: bool = True

@app.post("/courses/", status_code=201)
def create_course(course: CourseCreate):
    # course.title, course.description, course.price
    return {"message": "Kurs yaratildi", "course": course}
```

**Response Model:**
```python
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List

class CourseResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    price: float
    # description va boshqa sezgir ma'lumotlar chiqarilmaydi

@app.get("/courses/{course_id}", response_model=CourseResponse)
def get_course(course_id: int):
    # DB'dan olingan to'liq ma'lumot
    course = {"id": course_id, "title": "Python", "price": 99, "internal_notes": "SECRET"}
    # response_model faqat ko'rsatilgan maydonlarni qaytaradi
    return course
```

**Status Codes va HTTPException:**
```python
from fastapi import HTTPException

@app.get("/users/{user_id}")
def get_user(user_id: int):
    user = users_db.get(user_id)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=404,
            detail=f"User {user_id} topilmadi"
        )
    return user

@app.delete("/courses/{course_id}", status_code=204)
def delete_course(course_id: int):
    if course_id not in courses_db:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Kurs topilmadi")
    del courses_db[course_id]
    # 204 No Content — hech narsa qaytarilmaydi
```

**Routers (modullar bo'yicha ajratish):**
```python
# routers/courses.py
from fastapi import APIRouter

router = APIRouter(prefix="/courses", tags=["Courses"])

@router.get("/")
def list_courses():
    return ["Python", "Django", "FastAPI"]

# main.py
from routers import courses, users
app.include_router(courses.router)
app.include_router(users.router)
```

FastAPI o'zining avtomatik dokumentatsiyasi, type hint'lar va tezligi bilan zamonaviy Python API ishlab chiqishda eng yaxshi tanlovlardan biridir.

quiz.savol: FastAPI ilovasini ishga tushirish uchun qaysi buyruq ishlatiladi?
quiz.tushuntirish: FastAPI ASGI server'da ishlaydi. Uvicorn — eng mashhur ASGI server. main:app degani main.py faylidagi app obyekti.

quiz.savol: FastAPI'da avtomatik Swagger dokumentatsiyasi qaysi URL'da ko'rinadi?
quiz.tushuntirish: FastAPI avtomatik ravishda /docs (Swagger UI) va /redoc (ReDoc) URL'larini yaratadi. Hech qanday qo'shimcha konfiguratsiya kerak emas.

quiz.savol: Path parameter'ni integer sifatida qabul qilsak nima bo'ladi?
quiz.B: FastAPI avtomatik validatsiya qiladi, integer bo'lmasa 422 xato qaytaradi
quiz.tushuntirish: FastAPI Python type hint'lar asosida avtomatik validatsiya qiladi. /users/abc yuborilsa, abc int ga o'zgartirib bo'lmagani uchun 422 Unprocessable Entity xatosi qaytariladi.

quiz.B: Javobda faqat ko'rsatilgan maydonlarni qaytarish va dokumentatsiyada ko'rsatish
quiz.tushuntirish: response_model javobdan ortiqcha maydonlarni filterlaydi. Masalan, DB'dagi password, internal_notes kabi maydonlar javobga qo'shilmaydi. Swagger'da ham javob sxemasi ko'rsatiladi.

quiz.B: Endpoint'larni alohida fayllarga ajratish va organize qilish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: Katta loyihalarda barcha endpoint'larni main.py'ga yozish noqulay. APIRouter bilan courses.py, users.py, auth.py kabi alohida fayllar yaratiladi va main.py'da include_router bilan ulanadi.

topshiriq.vazifa: FastAPI yordamida oddiy kutubxona API'si yarating. Kitoblar ro'yxati, bitta kitob ma'lumoti va yangi kitob qo'shish endpoint'lari bo'lsin.

nazariya:
Pydantic — Python uchun ma'lumot validatsiyasi va parsing kutubxonasi. FastAPI ichida chuqur integratsiyalangan. Type hint'lar asosida ma'lumotlarni avtomatik validatsiya qiladi va xato xabarlarini aniq ko'rsatadi.

**Pydantic BaseModel asoslari:**
```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, validator, EmailStr
from typing import Optional, List
from datetime import datetime
from enum import Enum

class CourseLevel(str, Enum):
    beginner = "boshlang'ich"
    intermediate = "o'rta"
    advanced = "murakkab"

class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    username: str
    email: EmailStr  # avtomatik email format tekshiruvi
    password: str
    age: Optional[int] = None
    level: CourseLevel = CourseLevel.beginner
```

**Field bilan qo'shimcha validatsiya:**
```python
class CourseCreate(BaseModel):
    title: str = Field(
        min_length=3,
        max_length=100,
        description="Kurs nomi",
        example="Python Asoslari"
    )
    price: float = Field(gt=0, le=10000, description="Narxi (USD)")
    duration_weeks: int = Field(ge=1, le=52, description="Davomiyligi (haftalar)")
    tags: List[str] = Field(default=[], max_items=10)
    
    class Config:
        schema_extra = {
            "example": {
                "title": "Python Professional",
                "price": 99.99,
                "duration_weeks": 8,
                "tags": ["python", "backend"]
            }
        }
```

**Custom Validator'lar:**
```python
from pydantic import validator

class UserRegister(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str
    confirm_password: str
    phone: str
    
    @validator('username')
    def username_alphanumeric(cls, v):
        if not v.replace('_', '').isalnum():
            raise ValueError('Username faqat harf, raqam va _ bo\'lishi mumkin')
        return v.lower()  # kichik harfga o'tkazamiz
    
    @validator('password')
    def password_strength(cls, v):
        if len(v) < 8:
            raise ValueError('Parol kamida 8 belgidan iborat bo\'lishi kerak')
        if not any(c.isupper() for c in v):
            raise ValueError('Parolda kamida 1 ta katta harf bo\'lishi kerak')
        return v
    
    @validator('confirm_password')
    def passwords_match(cls, v, values):
        if 'password' in values and v != values['password']:
            raise ValueError('Parollar mos kelmadi')
        return v
    
    @validator('phone')
    def phone_format(cls, v):
        # O'zbekiston telefon raqami: +998XXXXXXXXX
        import re
        pattern = r'^\+998[0-9]{9}$'
        if not re.match(pattern, v):
            raise ValueError('Noto\'g\'ri telefon format. Misol: +998901234567')
        return v
```

**Nested Models:**
```python
class Address(BaseModel):
    city: str
    region: str
    country: str = "Uzbekistan"

class UserProfile(BaseModel):
    user_id: int
    bio: Optional[str] = None
    address: Optional[Address] = None
    social_links: dict = {}

class UserFull(BaseModel):
    id: int
    username: str
    email: str
    profile: UserProfile
    created_at: datetime
    courses: List[str] = []
```

**ORM Integration (SQLAlchemy bilan):**
```python
from pydantic import BaseModel

# DB'dan o'qish uchun
class CourseDB(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    price: float
    created_at: datetime
    
    class Config:
        orm_mode = True  # SQLAlchemy ob'ektini qabul qiladi

# View'da ishlatish
@app.get("/courses/{id}", response_model=CourseDB)
def get_course(id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    course = db.query(Course).filter(Course.id == id).first()
    return course  # SQLAlchemy ob'ekti → Pydantic avtomatik convert qiladi
```

**Request Validation xatolari:**
```python
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from pydantic import ValidationError

@app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)
async def validation_exception_handler(request: Request, exc):
    errors = []
    for error in exc.errors():
        errors.append({
            'field': ' -> '.join(str(x) for x in error['loc']),
            'message': error['msg'],
            'type': error['type']
        })
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=422,
        content={'detail': 'Validatsiya xatosi', 'errors': errors}
    )
```

**Response Schemas (bir modeldan bir nechta):**
```python
class UserBase(BaseModel):
    username: str
    email: str

class UserCreate(UserBase):
    password: str  # faqat yaratishda kerak

class UserResponse(UserBase):
    id: int
    xp: int = 0
    created_at: datetime
    
    class Config:
        orm_mode = True

class UserUpdate(BaseModel):
    username: Optional[str] = None
    email: Optional[str] = None
    # password alohida endpoint orqali o'zgartiriladi
```

Pydantic FastAPI'ning eng kuchli qismi — u kod yozishni osonlashtiradi, xatolarni aniq ko'rsatadi va API dokumentatsiyasini avtomatik yaratadi.

quiz.A: Qiymat 0 dan katta va 10000 dan kichik yoki teng bo'lishi kerak
quiz.B: Qiymat 0 dan katta yoki teng va 10000 dan kichik bo'lishi kerak
quiz.C: Qiymat 0 va 10000 orasida bo'lishi shart emas
quiz.tushuntirish: gt = greater than (kattaroq), le = less than or equal (kichik yoki teng). gt=0 degani 0 dan KATTA (0 emas), le=10000 degani 10000 dan KICHIK yoki TENG.

quiz.B: Pydantic modeliga SQLAlchemy ORM ob'ektini qabul qildirish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: Odatda Pydantic dict qabul qiladi. orm_mode=True bilan SQLAlchemy ob'ektlarini ham qabul qiladi. Bu .from_orm() metodini yoqadi.
Validator'lar class method sifatida ishlaydi. cls — bu model klassi. v — validatsiya qilinayotgan qiymat. values — oldingi validatsiya o'tgan maydonlar.
EmailStr Pydantic'da bor, lekin ishlashi uchun email-validator kutubxonasi o'rnatilgan bo'lishi kerak: pip install email-validator

quiz.savol: Pydantic validatsiya xatosi qanday HTTP status code qaytaradi?
quiz.tushuntirish: FastAPI Pydantic validatsiya xatolarini 422 Unprocessable Entity bilan qaytaradi. Xato tafsilotlari errors massivida ko'rsatiladi.

topshiriq.vazifa: O'quvchi ro'yxatdan o'tish formasi uchun Pydantic model yarating. Username (3-20 belgi, faqat harf/raqam/_), email, parol (8+ belgi, katta harf bor), telefon (+998XXXXXXXXX), yosh (14-100) validatsiyalari bo'lsin.

nazariya:
FastAPI'ning eng kuchli tomoni — asinxron (async/await) dasturlashni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlashi. Bu Node.js darajasidagi tezlikni Python'da yozish imkonini beradi.

**Sync va Async farqi:**
```python
import asyncio
import httpx

# SYNC — kutadi, keyingisi boshlanmaydi
def sync_fetch():
    import requests
    response = requests.get('https://api.example.com/data')  # 2 soniya kutadi
    return response.json()

# ASYNC — kutayotganda boshqa ishlarni bajaradi
async def async_fetch():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        response = await client.get('https://api.example.com/data')  # kutayotganda boshqa request'lar ishlaydi
        return response.json()
```

**FastAPI Async Endpoint'lar:**
```python
from fastapi import FastAPI
import asyncio
import httpx

app = FastAPI()

# Asinxron endpoint
@app.get("/slow-data")
async def get_slow_data():
    await asyncio.sleep(2)  # IO kutishi simulyatsiyasi
    return {"data": "Natija"}

# Bir vaqtda bir nechta async so'rovlar
@app.get("/combined")
async def get_combined_data():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        # Ikkala so'rov parallel bajariladi (4 soniya o'rniga 2 soniya)
        task1, task2 = await asyncio.gather(
            client.get("https://api1.example.com/users"),
            client.get("https://api2.example.com/orders")
        )
    return {
        "users": task1.json(),
        "orders": task2.json()
    }
```

**Async Database (databases kutubxonasi bilan):**
```python
from databases import Database
import sqlalchemy

DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://user:pass@localhost/dbname"
database = Database(DATABASE_URL)
metadata = sqlalchemy.MetaData()

users = sqlalchemy.Table(
    "users", metadata,
    sqlalchemy.Column("id", sqlalchemy.Integer, primary_key=True),
    sqlalchemy.Column("username", sqlalchemy.String(50)),
    sqlalchemy.Column("xp", sqlalchemy.Integer, default=0),
)

@app.on_event("startup")
async def startup():
    await database.connect()

@app.on_event("shutdown")
async def shutdown():
    await database.disconnect()

@app.get("/users/")
async def get_users():
    query = users.select().order_by(users.c.xp.desc())
    return await database.fetch_all(query)

@app.post("/users/")
async def create_user(username: str, email: str):
    query = users.insert().values(username=username, email=email)
    user_id = await database.execute(query)
    return {"id": user_id, "username": username}
```

**Async Cache (aioredis bilan):**
```python
import aioredis
from fastapi import FastAPI

app = FastAPI()
redis = None

@app.on_event("startup")
async def startup_event():
    global redis
    redis = await aioredis.create_redis_pool('redis://localhost')

@app.on_event("shutdown")
async def shutdown_event():
    redis.close()
    await redis.wait_closed()

@app.get("/leaderboard")
async def get_leaderboard():
    # Cache tekshirish
    cached = await redis.get('leaderboard')
    if cached:
        import json
        return json.loads(cached)
    
    # DB'dan o'qish (simulyatsiya)
    await asyncio.sleep(0.1)  # DB query
    data = [{"username": "ali", "xp": 500}]
    
    # Cache'ga saqlash
    await redis.setex('leaderboard', 300, json.dumps(data))
    return data
```

**Background Tasks:**
```python
from fastapi import BackgroundTasks

async def send_notification_email(email: str, message: str):
    """Fon vazifasi — response'dan keyin bajariladi"""
    await asyncio.sleep(1)  # email yuborish simulyatsiyasi
    print(f"Email {email} ga yuborildi: {message}")

@app.post("/register/")
async def register(
    email: str,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks
):
    # Asosiy ish
    user_id = 123  # DB'ga saqlash
    
    # Email fonda yuboriladi — foydalanuvchi kutmaydi
    background_tasks.add_task(
        send_notification_email,
        email,
        "Xush kelibsiz SYNAPSE'ga!"
    )
    
    return {"user_id": user_id, "status": "registered"}
```

**Middleware (async):**
```python
import time
from fastapi import Request

@app.middleware("http")
async def add_process_time_header(request: Request, call_next):
    start_time = time.time()
    response = await call_next(request)
    process_time = time.time() - start_time
    response.headers["X-Process-Time"] = str(process_time)
    return response
```

**Qachon async, qachon sync ishlatish:**
- async def: database so'rovlari, HTTP so'rovlari, fayl o'qish/yozish
- def (oddiy): CPU'ga og'ir hisoblashlar (ML modellar, rasm qayta ishlash)

FastAPI sync endpoint'larni ham thread pool'da ishlatadi, shuning uchun ikkalasi ham ishlaydi.

quiz.B: Bir nechta async task'larni parallel bajarish
quiz.tushuntirish: asyncio.gather() bir nechta coroutine'ni parallel bajaradi. Agar har biri 2 soniya olsa va ikkitasi bo'lsa — 4 soniya emas, 2 soniyada bajariladi.
BackgroundTasks response yuborilgandan keyin bajariladi. Celery kabi alohida worker shart emas. Oddiy, qisqa background ishlari (email, log) uchun qulay.

quiz.savol: Qachon def (sync) endpoint ishlatish maqsadga muvofiq?
quiz.B: CPU intensive ishlar uchun (ML, hisoblash) — FastAPI thread pool'da bajaradi
quiz.tushuntirish: FastAPI sync funksiyalarni threadpool'da bajaradi. CPU-intensive ishlar (numpy, pandas) uchun sync to'g'riroq, chunki async event loop'ni blokirovka qiladi.

quiz.C: Server ishga tushganda bir marta bajariladi (DB ulanish, cache init)
quiz.tushuntirish: startup event server ishga tushganda bir marta bajariladi. DB connection pool, Redis connection, ML model yuklash kabi ishlar uchun ishlatiladi.

quiz.B: Async HTTP so'rovlar yuborish uchun (requests kutubxonasining async versiyasi)
quiz.tushuntirish: requests kutubxonasi sync ishlaydi va async endpoint'larni blokirovka qiladi. httpx — async qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan HTTP client. AsyncClient bilan await ishlatiladi.

topshiriq.yechim:
import asyncio
from fastapi import FastAPI
import time

app = FastAPI()

async def fetch_weather(city):
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    return {"city": city, "temp": 28, "condition": "Quyoshli"}

async def fetch_news(topic):
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    return {"topic": topic, "articles": ["Python 4.0 chiqdi!"]}

async def fetch_stocks(symbol):
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    return {"symbol": symbol, "price": 150.25}

@app.get('/dashboard/')
async def get_dashboard(city: str = 'Toshkent', topic: str = 'tech', stock: str = 'AAPL'):
    start = time.time()
    weather, news, stocks = await asyncio.gather(
        fetch_weather(city),
        fetch_news(topic),
        fetch_stocks(stock)
    )
    return {
        'weather': weather,
        'news': news,
        'stocks': stocks,
        'time_taken': round(time.time() - start, 2)
    }

pdf_reference: FastAPI Async: https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/async/ | Python asyncio: https://docs.python.org/3/library/asyncio.html

nazariya:
WebSocket — server va client o'rtasida doimiy ikki tomonlama aloqa kanali. HTTP'dan farqli ravishda har safar yangi ulanish o'rnatilmaydi — bitta ulanish ochiq qoladi va ma'lumotlar ikki tomonga ham yuborilishi mumkin. **WebSocket vs HTTP:** | | HTTP | WebSocket | |--|------|----------| | Ulanish | Har so'rovda yangi | Bir marta, doimiy | | Yo'nalish | Client → Server | Ikki tomonlama | | Foydalanish | Oddiy API | Chat, live data, gaming | | Overhead | Katta (headers) | Kichik | **Oddiy WebSocket endpoint:** ```python from fastapi import FastAPI, WebSocket from fastapi.websockets import WebSocketDisconnect app = FastAPI() @app.websocket("/ws") async def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket): await websocket.accept() # ulanishni qabul qilish try: while True: # Client'dan xabar kutish data = await websocket.receive_text() # Javob yuborish await websocket.send_text(f"Siz yubordingiz: {data}") except WebSocketDisconnect: print("Client uzildi") ``` **HTML Client:** ```html
``` **Connection Manager — Chat ilovasi:** ```python from fastapi import FastAPI, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect from typing import List, Dict import json app = FastAPI() class ConnectionManager: def __init__(self): # room_id → [websocket1, websocket2, ...] self.active_connections: Dict[str, List[WebSocket]] = {} async def connect(self, websocket: WebSocket, room_id: str, username: str): await websocket.accept() if room_id not in self.active_connections: self.active_connections[room_id] = [] self.active_connections[room_id].append(websocket) # Hammasiga xabar yuborish await self.broadcast( f"{username} xonaga kirdi", room_id, sender=websocket ) def disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket, room_id: str): if room_id in self.active_connections: self.active_connections[room_id].remove(websocket) async def send_personal(self, message: str, websocket: WebSocket): await websocket.send_text(message) async def broadcast(self, message: str, room_id: str, sender=None): """Xonadagi barcha foydalanuvchilarga yuborish""" if room_id in self.active_connections: for connection in self.active_connections[room_id]: if connection != sender: # yuboruvchiga qayta yubormaymiz await connection.send_text(message) manager = ConnectionManager() @app.websocket("/chat/{room_id}/{username}") async def chat_endpoint( websocket: WebSocket, room_id: str, username: str ): await manager.connect(websocket, room_id, username) try: while True: data = await websocket.receive_text() message = json.dumps({ "username": username, "message": data, "room": room_id }) # Xonadagi hammaga yuborish (o'ziga ham) for conn in manager.active_connections.get(room_id, []): await conn.send_text(message) except WebSocketDisconnect: manager.disconnect(websocket, room_id) await manager.broadcast( f"{username} xonadan chiqdi", room_id ) ``` **JSON ma'lumotlar yuborish:** ```python @app.websocket("/live-data/{user_id}") async def live_data(websocket: WebSocket, user_id: int): await websocket.accept() try: while True: # JSON qabul qilish data = await websocket.receive_json() action = data.get('action') if action == 'get_xp': # DB'dan XP olish xp = await get_user_xp(user_id) await websocket.send_json({ 'type': 'xp_update', 'xp': xp, 'level': xp // 100 }) elif action == 'ping': await websocket.send_json({'type': 'pong'}) except WebSocketDisconnect: pass ``` **Authentication bilan WebSocket:** ```python from fastapi import Query @app.websocket("/ws/protected") async def protected_ws( websocket: WebSocket, token: str = Query(...) ): # Token tekshirish user = verify_token(token) if not user: await websocket.close(code=1008) # Policy Violation return await websocket.accept() await websocket.send_text(f"Xush kelibsiz, {user.username}!") # ... ``` WebSocket SYNAPSE'da real-time leaderboard yangilanishi, dars davomida live chat va kod bajarish natijalari ko'rsatish uchun ishlatilishi mumkin.

quiz.savol: WebSocket ulanishini qabul qilish uchun qaysi metod ishlatiladi?
quiz.tushuntirish: WebSocket endpoint'da birinchi ish websocket.accept() chaqirish. Bu ulanishni rasman qabul qiladi. Qabul qilmasdan data yuborish/qabul qilish imkoni yo'q.
Client browser'ni yopsa, tab'ni yopsa yoki ws.close() chaqirsa WebSocketDisconnect xatosi yuz beradi. try/except bilan ushlanadi va cleanup qilinadi.

quiz.B: Ikki tomonlama real-time aloqa — server ham istalgan vaqt xabar yubora oladi
quiz.tushuntirish: HTTP'da faqat client so'rov yuboradi. WebSocket'da server ham istalgan vaqt (push) xabar yuborishi mumkin. Bu real-time chat, notifications, live scores uchun zarur.
send_json() avtomatik json.dumps() qilib yuboradi. Qabul qiluvchi tomonda receive_json() bilan o'qiladi. Bu JSON protokolida ishlashni osonlashtiradi.
WebSocket'lar ws:// (oddiy) va wss:// (SSL/TLS bilan xavfsiz) protokollaridan foydalanadi. Production'da wss:// ishlatish majburiy.

nazariya:
JWT (JSON Web Token) — stateless autentifikatsiya uchun standart. Server sessiya saqlamaydi — token o'zi ichida ma'lumotlarni olib yuradi.

**JWT tuzilishi:**
Header.Payload.Signature
```
eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhbGkiLCJleHAiOjE3MDAwMDB9.xxx
```

**O'rnatish:**
```bash
pip install python-jose[cryptography] passlib[bcrypt] python-multipart
```

**To'liq JWT Auth tizimi:**
```python
from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.security import OAuth2PasswordBearer, OAuth2PasswordRequestForm
from jose import JWTError, jwt
from passlib.context import CryptContext
from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Optional

# Konfiguratsiya
SECRET_KEY = "your-super-secret-key-change-in-production"
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 30
REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS = 7

pwd_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")
oauth2_scheme = OAuth2PasswordBearer(tokenUrl="token")

app = FastAPI()

# Modellar
class Token(BaseModel):
    access_token: str
    refresh_token: str
    token_type: str

class TokenData(BaseModel):
    username: Optional[str] = None
    role: str = "student"

class User(BaseModel):
    id: int
    username: str
    email: str
    role: str
    is_active: bool

# Fake DB
fake_users_db = {
    "ali": {
        "id": 1,
        "username": "ali",
        "email": "ali@test.com",
        "hashed_password": pwd_context.hash("secret123"),
        "role": "student",
        "is_active": True
    },
    "admin": {
        "id": 2,
        "username": "admin",
        "email": "admin@synapse.uz",
        "hashed_password": pwd_context.hash("admin123"),
        "role": "admin",
        "is_active": True
    }
}

# Utility funksiyalar
def verify_password(plain_password: str, hashed_password: str) -> bool:
    return pwd_context.verify(plain_password, hashed_password)

def get_password_hash(password: str) -> str:
    return pwd_context.hash(password)

def create_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta) -> str:
    to_encode = data.copy()
    expire = datetime.utcnow() + expires_delta
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    return jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)

def authenticate_user(username: str, password: str):
    user = fake_users_db.get(username)
    if not user or not verify_password(password, user["hashed_password"]):
        return None
    return user

# Token endpoint
@app.post("/token", response_model=Token)
async def login(form_data: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm = Depends()):
    user = authenticate_user(form_data.username, form_data.password)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
            detail="Noto'g'ri username yoki parol",
            headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
        )
    
    access_token = create_token(
        data={"sub": user["username"], "role": user["role"]},
        expires_delta=timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    )
    refresh_token = create_token(
        data={"sub": user["username"], "type": "refresh"},
        expires_delta=timedelta(days=REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS)
    )
    
    return {
        "access_token": access_token,
        "refresh_token": refresh_token,
        "token_type": "bearer"
    }

# Dependency — joriy foydalanuvchini olish
async def get_current_user(token: str = Depends(oauth2_scheme)):
    credentials_exception = HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail="Token noto'g'ri yoki muddati tugagan",
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
    )
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        username: str = payload.get("sub")
        if username is None:
            raise credentials_exception
    except JWTError:
        raise credentials_exception
    
    user = fake_users_db.get(username)
    if user is None:
        raise credentials_exception
    return user

async def get_current_active_user(current_user = Depends(get_current_user)):
    if not current_user["is_active"]:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Faol bo'lmagan foydalanuvchi")
    return current_user

# Role-based access
def require_role(role: str):
    async def role_checker(current_user = Depends(get_current_active_user)):
        if current_user["role"] != role:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
                detail="Ruxsat yo'q"
            )
        return current_user
    return role_checker

# Protected endpoint'lar
@app.get("/me")
async def read_me(current_user = Depends(get_current_active_user)):
    return {
        "username": current_user["username"],
        "email": current_user["email"],
        "role": current_user["role"]
    }

@app.get("/admin/dashboard")
async def admin_dashboard(admin = Depends(require_role("admin"))):
    return {"message": "Admin panel", "users_count": len(fake_users_db)}
```

**Refresh Token endpoint:**
```python
@app.post("/token/refresh")
async def refresh_token(refresh_token: str):
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(refresh_token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        if payload.get("type") != "refresh":
            raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Noto'g'ri token turi")
        username = payload.get("sub")
        user = fake_users_db.get(username)
        if not user:
            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Foydalanuvchi topilmadi")
        
        new_access_token = create_token(
            data={"sub": username, "role": user["role"]},
            expires_delta=timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
        )
        return {"access_token": new_access_token, "token_type": "bearer"}
    except JWTError:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Refresh token yaroqsiz")
```

JWT SYNAPSE'da barcha API endpoint'larini himoya qilish va foydalanuvchi rollarini (student/admin/premium) boshqarish uchun ishlatiladi.

quiz.tushuntirish: JWT = Header (algoritm) + Payload (ma'lumotlar: sub, exp, role) + Signature (HMAC yoki RSA imzo). Uchala qism Base64 bilan kodlangan va nuqta bilan ajratilgan.
bcrypt parolni bir tomonlama hash qiladi. DB'da parol ochiq saqlanmaydi. Tekshirishda bcrypt.verify() ishlatiladi — teskari qaytarish imkoni yo'q.

quiz.savol: Access token va Refresh token farqi nima?
quiz.B: Access token qisqa muddatli (30 daqiqa), Refresh token uzoq muddatli (7 kun) va yangi access token olish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: Access token qisqa yashaydi (xavfsizlik uchun). Muddati tugaganda, Refresh token bilan yangi access token olinadi. Foydalanuvchi qayta login qilmaydi.

quiz.B: Swagger'da 'Authorize' tugmasi paydo bo'ladi va Authorization header'dan token o'qiydi
quiz.tushuntirish: OAuth2PasswordBearer Swagger UI'da autentifikatsiya oynasi yaratadi. U HTTP request'ning Authorization: Bearer <token> header'idan tokenni o'qib Depends() orqali endpoint'ga uzatadi.

quiz.B: 401 — autentifikatsiya yo'q/xato, 403 — autentifikatsiya bo'lgan lekin ruxsat yo'q
quiz.tushuntirish: 401: Login qilmagan yoki token noto'g'ri. 403: Login qilgan, lekin bu resursga (admin panel) ruxsat yo'q. Role-based access control'da 403 ishlatiladi.

topshiriq.vazifa: FastAPI'da sodda JWT auth tizimi yarating: POST /login/ (username/password qabul qilsin), GET /profile/ (faqat token bilan kirish), GET /admin/ (faqat admin role uchun). Test foydalanuvchilar: {student: pass123} va {admin: admin123}.

nazariya:
Test yozish — professional dasturchilik madaniyatining muhim qismi. FastAPI'da pytest va TestClient yordamida endpoint'larni test qilish juda oson.

**O'rnatish:**
```bash
pip install pytest httpx pytest-asyncio
```

**Test fayl strukturasi:**
```
myproject/
├── main.py
├── routers/
│   ├── users.py
│   └── courses.py
└── tests/
    ├── __init__.py
    ├── conftest.py      # umumiy fixture'lar
    ├── test_users.py
    └── test_courses.py
```

**Asosiy TestClient ishlatish:**
```python
# main.py
from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel

app = FastAPI()

items_db = {}

class Item(BaseModel):
    name: str
    price: float

@app.get("/items/{item_id}")
def get_item(item_id: int):
    if item_id not in items_db:
        from fastapi import HTTPException
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Topilmadi")
    return items_db[item_id]

@app.post("/items/", status_code=201)
def create_item(item: Item):
    item_id = len(items_db) + 1
    items_db[item_id] = item.dict()
    return {"id": item_id, **item.dict()}
```

```python
# tests/test_items.py
import pytest
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from main import app, items_db

client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    """Har test oldidan DB'ni tozalash"""
    items_db.clear()

def test_create_item():
    response = client.post("/items/", json={"name": "Python Kitob", "price": 25.99})
    assert response.status_code == 201
    data = response.json()
    assert data["name"] == "Python Kitob"
    assert data["price"] == 25.99
    assert "id" in data

def test_get_item():
    # Avval yaratamiz
    create_res = client.post("/items/", json={"name": "Test Item", "price": 10.0})
    item_id = create_res.json()["id"]
    
    # Keyin o'qiymiz
    response = client.get(f"/items/{item_id}")
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["name"] == "Test Item"

def test_item_not_found():
    response = client.get("/items/9999")
    assert response.status_code == 404
    assert response.json()["detail"] == "Topilmadi"

def test_invalid_item_price():
    # Manfiy narx bo'lmasligi kerak (agar validatsiya bo'lsa)
    response = client.post("/items/", json={"name": "Bad Item", "price": -1})
    # Agar validatsiya yo'q bo'lsa 201, bor bo'lsa 422
    assert response.status_code in [201, 422]
```

def test_login_success(client):

        "password": "secret123"
    })
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert "access_token" in response.json()

def test_login_wrong_password(client):

        "password": "wrong"
    })
    assert response.status_code == 401

def test_protected_without_token(client):
    response = client.get("/me")
    assert response.status_code == 401

def test_protected_with_token(client, auth_headers):
    response = client.get("/me", headers=auth_headers)
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["username"] == "ali"

**TDD (Test Driven Development) yondashuvi:**
1. Avval test yozing (qizil — fail)
2. Minimal kod yozing (yashil — pass)
3. Kodni yaxshilang (refactor)

Har bitta PR'da yangi feature uchun test bo'lishi professional standarti.

quiz.tushuntirish: TestClient fastapi.testclient modulida. Ichida httpx ishlatadi. Server ishga tushirmasdan endpoint'larni test qilish imkonini beradi.

quiz.B: Test'lar uchun qayta ishlatiladigan setup kodi (ma'lumot, ulanish, token)
quiz.tushuntirish: @pytest.fixture bilan yaratilgan funksiyalar test'ga parametr sifatida uzatiladi. client(), auth_token(), test_db() kabi umumiy setup kodi bir marta yoziladi.
assert — Python'da shart tekshirish. Agar shart bajarilmasa AssertionError chiqadi va test fail bo'ladi. status_code 201 bo'lishi kerak, aks holda test o'tmaydi.

quiz.B: Barcha test'lar uchun umumiy fixture'larni bir joyda yozish
quiz.tushuntirish: conftest.py pytest tomonidan avtomatik topiladi. Undagi fixture'lar barcha test fayllarga import qilmasdan ham ishlaydi. DRY prinsipi uchun ideal.

quiz.B: Kod coverage hisobotini yaratadi — qaysi qatorlar test qilinganini ko'rsatadi
quiz.tushuntirish: Coverage — test'lar kodning necha foizini qamrab olgani. pip install pytest-cov kerak. 80%+ coverage yaxshi standart. --cov-report=html brauzerda ko'rish mumkin.

topshiriq.vazifa: Oddiy kalkulyator API uchun to'liq test suite yozing. POST /calculate/ endpoint'i {a, b, operation} qabul qilib, add/subtract/multiply/divide bajarsin. Nol bo'lishni ham test qiling.

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from main import app

client = TestClient(app)

def test_add():
    r = client.post('/calculate/', json={'a': 3, 'b': 5, 'operation': 'add'})
    assert r.status_code == 200
    assert r.json()['result'] == 8

def test_subtract():
    r = client.post('/calculate/', json={'a': 10, 'b': 3, 'operation': 'subtract'})
    assert r.status_code == 200
    assert r.json()['result'] == 7

def test_multiply():
    r = client.post('/calculate/', json={'a': 4, 'b': 5, 'operation': 'multiply'})
    assert r.status_code == 200
    assert r.json()['result'] == 20

def test_divide():
    r = client.post('/calculate/', json={'a': 10, 'b': 4, 'operation': 'divide'})
    assert r.status_code == 200
    assert r.json()['result'] == 2.5

def test_divide_by_zero():
    r = client.post('/calculate/', json={'a': 5, 'b': 0, 'operation': 'divide'})
    assert r.status_code == 400
    assert 'nolga' in r.json()['detail'].lower()

def test_invalid_operation():
    r = client.post('/calculate/', json={'a': 5, 'b': 2, 'operation': 'power'})
    assert r.status_code == 400
